property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\sqlite3;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11 in;C:\Users\2401a\.cargo in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\spicetify;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;c:\Users\2401a\.antigravity\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.3-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testEvaluate_operatorPrecedence
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [3, 4, 2, *, +] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '3' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 3. Current Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '4' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 4. Current Stack: [3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [3, 4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '*' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: * (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 4, 2 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 8. Current Stack: [3, 8] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '+' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: + (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 3, 8 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 11. Current Stack: [11] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [11] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [11]

testcase.name: testEvaluate_allOperators
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [3, 4, 2, *, 1, 5, -, 2, ^, /, +] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '3' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 3. Current Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '4' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 4. Current Stack: [3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [3, 4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '*' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: * (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 4, 2 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 8. Current Stack: [3, 8] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '1' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 1. Current Stack: [3, 8, 1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8, 1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '5' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 5. Current Stack: [3, 8, 1, 5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8, 1, 5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '-' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: - (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 1, 5 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: -4. Current Stack: [3, 8, -4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8, -4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [3, 8, -4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8, -4, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '^' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: ^ (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: -4, 2 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 16. Current Stack: [3, 8, 16] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 8, 16] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '/' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: / (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 8, 16 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 0.5. Current Stack: [3, 0.5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3, 0.5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '+' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: + (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 3, 0.5 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 3.5. Current Stack: [3.5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3.5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [3.5]

testcase.name: testEvaluate_parentheses
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [3, 4, +, 2, *] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '3' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 3. Current Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '4' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 4. Current Stack: [3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Current Stack: [7] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [7] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [7, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [7, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '*' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: * (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 7, 2 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 14. Current Stack: [14] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [14] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [14]

testcase.name: testEvaluate_constants
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [PI, 2, *] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: 'PI' ConstantsLoader Debug: Attempting to get constant 'PI'. Value found: 3.141592653589793 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Constant: 3.141592653589793. Current Stack: [3.141592653589793115997963468544185] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3.141592653589793115997963468544185] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [3.141592653589793115997963468544185, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3.141592653589793115997963468544185, 2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '*' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: * (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 3.141592653589793115997963468544185, 2 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 6.283185307179586231995926937088370. Current Stack: [6.283185307179586231995926937088370] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [6.283185307179586231995926937088370] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [6.283185307179586231995926937088370]

testcase.name: testEvaluate_functions
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [90, sin] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '90' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 90. Current Stack: [90] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Current Stack: [1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [1]

testcase.name: testEvaluate_unaryMinus
testcase.system-out: PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [3, NEG, 4, +] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '3' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 3. Current Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: 'NEG' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: NEG (Type: UNARY_PREFIX) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for unary op: 3 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Unary Result: -3. Current Stack: [-3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [-3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '4' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 4. Current Stack: [-3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [-3, 4] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '+' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: + (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: -3, 4 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 1. Current Stack: [1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [1]
